seo.title: Bistro
seo.description: Production-ready Nuxt 4 SaaS boilerplate with auth, multi-tenancy, and RBAC.

banner.announcement: New: Command palette search with Cmd+K

footer.tagline: Open source todo app built with Nuxt.

hero.headline: 100% Free & Open Source
hero.title: The simplest way to manage your tasks
hero.description: Bistro is a free, open-source todo app that helps you stay organized. No bloat, no complexity - just a clean interface to get things done.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.description: Focus on what matters. Bistro keeps task management simple while providing the essentials for personal productivity.
features.simpleTaskManagementDescription: Create, organize, and complete tasks with an intuitive interface. No learning curve required.
features.smartFilteringDescription: Filter tasks by status, sort by date or priority. Find what you need instantly.
features.teamCollaborationDescription: Create organizations, invite team members, and manage tasks together.
features.darkModeDescription: Easy on the eyes with automatic dark mode support. Work comfortably day or night.
features.worksEverywhereDescription: Fully responsive design that works beautifully on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
features.secureByDefaultDescription: Your data is yours. Self-host it or trust our secure infrastructure.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.description: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

free.title: Free
free.description: Everything you need to stay productive

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes! Bistro is 100% free and open source. There are no premium tiers, no hidden fees, and no credit card required. You can use all features without any limitations.
faq.a2: Absolutely. Bistro is open source and designed to be self-hosted. Check out our GitHub repository for deployment instructions using Docker or your preferred hosting platform.
faq.a3: Organizations allow you to collaborate with others. Create an organization, invite team members via email, and assign roles (Owner, Admin, Member, Guest) to control access levels.
faq.a4: Security is a priority. We use industry-standard encryption, secure authentication, and never share your data with third parties. For maximum control, you can always self-host.
faq.q5: What tech stack does Bistro use?
faq.a5: Bistro is built with Nuxt 4, Vue 3, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. It uses Better Auth for authentication and Nuxt UI for the component library.

cta.title: Get early access to new features
cta.description: Join our newsletter to be the first to know about updates, new features, and tips to boost your productivity.

testimonials.title: Loved by developers
testimonials.description: See what others are saying about Bistro.

sarah.name: Sarah Chen
sarah.quote: Finally, a todo app that doesn't try to do everything. Bistro is simple, fast, and just works. Perfect for my daily workflow.

marcus.name: Marcus Johnson
marcus.quote: We switched our team to Bistro and productivity went up. The organization features are exactly what we needed without the bloat.

emily.name: Emily Rodriguez
emily.quote: Love that it's open source! I can self-host it, customize it, and trust that my data stays mine. The codebase is clean too.
